steps.title: Define the term
steps.content: The student wants to explain what a sky island is. The notes define a sky island as an isolated mountain range whose environment differs drastically from the surrounding lowlands, with the Sierra San Luis as an example.

steps.title: Reject example-only choices
steps.content: A describes the Sierra San Luis but does not define the term. C identifies the Sierra San Luis as a sky island without explaining the concept. D focuses on the USFS phrase "unique ecosystem" rather than the definition. The answer is B.
